text.title: jenkins-pipelines Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for jenkins-pipelines as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Hardcoding secrets directly in the pipeline environment block.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Secrets in Jenkinsfiles are committed to version control and visible in build logs. Use withCredentials() or the credentials() binding instead.

failure-mode.description: Writing the same Docker build/push logic in every Jenkinsfile.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Copy-paste logic diverges over time. When the registry URL or build flags change, each Jenkinsfile must be updated individually.
